diagrams.title: Constructor vs Destructor Order in Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows the sequence of constructor and destructor calls when creating and destroying a derived class object
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how construction builds from base to derived, while destruction tears down from derived to base - the 'stacking' principle.

diagrams.title: Virtual Destructor Mechanism
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how virtual destructors enable proper cleanup through base class pointers using v-table
diagrams.purpose: Understand runtime polymorphism in destruction - how the correct destructor is called through virtual dispatch.

diagrams.title: Memory Leak without Virtual Destructor
diagrams.description: Shows what happens when deleting derived object through base pointer without virtual destructor
elements: Memory leak arrow pointing to lost resources
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the danger of forgetting virtual destructor - resources in derived class remain unfreed.

diagrams.title: Multiple Inheritance Destructor Order
diagrams.description: Shows destructor call order when class inherits from multiple base classes
elements: Class C inherits from A and B
Virtual base case: virtual base first
diagrams.purpose: Understand destructor sequencing in complex inheritance hierarchies.
